task.title: Release new version of VS Code extension to ship markdown formatting
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23857

It looks as if we never shipped a VS Code extension version with the new markdown formatting. Is this intentional? What's left to do?

rating.rationale: Agent did excellent research and produced a clear, well-structured timeline showing exactly why the extension hadn't shipped and confirming it has since been resolved. No code changes were needed so code_quality is neutral. Only missing a half-point on satisfaction because the agent could have proactively posted the closing comment rather than asking permission, given the autonomous review policy.
